personal_profile.headline: Staff Platform Engineer
personal_profile.summary: Platform and reliability engineer with infrastructure, incident response, and developer productivity experience.

bullets.text: Built Terraform modules and paved-road deployment templates used by more than 30 service teams.
Reduced cloud spend by 18% through right-sizing, workload scheduling, and storage policy changes.
Drove platform roadmap reviews with application teams to improve developer onboarding and service standards.
Cut mean time to recovery by 43% by redesigning incident response roles, runbooks, and service ownership coverage.
Ran Kubernetes reliability improvements and cluster upgrade playbooks for stateful production services.
Maintained WordPress sites and campus marketing pages for event promotions.

projects.name: Developer Provisioning Platform
projects.summary: Self-service environment provisioning for internal engineering teams.

bullets.text: Created a self-service provisioning flow with Terraform and policy guardrails for preview environments.
Built a lightweight simulator for incident command drills and postmortem facilitation practice.
